rulings.Case Title: LISA J. BAILLY-SOLWAY ET AL VS. HILARY C. PIERCE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Cross Complainants First Amended Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 11, 2016 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL INC.'s Motion To Strike Portions Of Cross Complainants First Amended Cross Complaint moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LISA J. BAILLY-SOLWAY ET AL VS. HILARY C. PIERCE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 11, 2016 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Cross-Complainant to allege an actionable cause of action for fraud against the moving party in light of the allegations in FACC (paragraphs 6, 7, and 9) and Wilhelm v. Pray, Rice, Williams & Russell (1986) 186 Cal.App.3d 1324.Moving party's request for judicial notice is granted as to exhibits B-D, and Denied as to Exhibit A. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAPLE D RABB VS. GEORGE E SANTOS COLORADO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton For Appointment Of Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 11, 2016 line 2. PLAINTIFF MAPLE RABB's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to sustain her burden under CCP 564(b)(1) or (9). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANA MACDONALD VS. DUKE PARTNERS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-16-654726 WITH CASE CGC-16-552327
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 11, 2016 line 3. PLAINTIFF ANA MACDONALD's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-16-654726 WITH CASE CGC-16-552327 OFF CALENDAR, action stayed per stipulation and order. The Court notes that no curtesy copy of the stipulation and proposed order was provided to the Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT GALLIANI VS. ROBERT LOPEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Of Order To Show Cause And Charging Affidavit For Contempt Of Order Of Injunction By Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 11, 2016 line 4. PLAINTIFF ROBERT GALLIANI's Order To Show Cause And Charging Affidavit For Contempt Of Order Of Injunction By Stipulation DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden to provide admissible competent evidence. Witness statements are not provided under the penalty of perjury. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S BANK TRUST N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR LSF9 MASTER VS. HENRY CHU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 11, 2016 line 5. PLAINTIFF U.S BANK TRUST N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR LSF9 MASTER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Opposing party failed to create triable issues of fact with competent admissible evidence. = (501/REQ)
